programme.title: Bare Knuckle Boxing

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Gegard Mousasi vs. Fabian Edwards, middleweight bout; Brent Primus vs. Mansour Barnaoui, lightweight world grand prix bout. From Accor Arena in Paris.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Vadim Nemkov vs. Yoel Romero, light heavyweight championship bout; Sergio Pettis vs. Patricio Pitbull, bantamweight championship bout. From Wintrust Arena in Chicago.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Logan Storley vs. Brennan Ward, welterweight bout; Valentin Moldavsky vs. Steve Mowry, heavyweight bout; Dalton Rosta vs. Aaron Jeffery, middleweight bout; Sidney Outlaw vs. Islam Mamedov, lightweight bout. From Aug. 11, 2023 in Sioux Falls, S.D.

programme.desc: Main event: Timur Khizriev vs. Brendan Loughnane.

programme.desc: Main event: Jason Jackson defeats Andrey Koreshkov.

programme.title: Warriors Cup
programme.desc: Warriors Cup is the sole US partner of ONE Championship, featuring top Muay Thai athletes from across America and around the world!

programme.title: Coach and Company
programme.desc: Jonathan Coachman hosts this no-holds-barred daily sports talk show. "The Coach" leads dynamic discussions with a rotating cast of all-star analysts and sports insiders.

programme.title: BKFC 67: Camozzi vs. Depee
programme.desc: Chris Camozzi vs. Sawyer Depee, cruiserweight championship; Brandon Girtz vs. Cameron Vancamp, welterweight. From Denver Coliseum in Denver.

programme.title: BKFC Fight Night - Newcastle: Terrill vs. McFarlane
programme.desc: Mick Terrill vs. Ghost McFarlane, heavyweight title bout. From Newcastle, U.K.

programme.desc: Featuring Kai Stewart vs. Nico Gaffie, Rosalinda Rodriguez vs. Shelby Cannon, plus more in bare-knuckle boxing action from Hollywood, Fla.

programme.desc: Host Brian Soscia discusses combat sporting news, exclusive BKFC content, interviews & more from the past month.

programme.title: BKFC 22: Lombard vs. Hunt
programme.desc: Hector Lombard tries to defend the cruiserweight title against Lorenzo Hunt, while Dat Nguyen looks to take the lightweight title from Luis Palomino. From Nov. 19, 2021.
